mapper.select: SELECT cu.id as `user_id`, cu.head_image_thumb as `portrait`, IF(cf.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR cf.remark_nick_name = '', cu.nick_name, cf.remark_nick_name) AS display_name FROM `chat_topic_like` ctl INNER JOIN `im_user` cu ON cu.`id` = ctl.`user_id` LEFT JOIN im_friend cf ON (cf.`friend_id` = ctl.`user_id` AND cf.deleted = 0 AND cf.`user_id` = #{userId}) WHERE ctl.topic_id = #{topicId} AND ctl.has_like = 'Y'
